description: A design engineer has submitted an ECR to change the material of a bracket to a lighter alloy. This must be reviewed and approved.

nodes.task_description: Review the ECR for completeness, including the justification, cost analysis, and impact assessment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the ECR form is filled out correctly.

nodes.task_description: Route the ECR to a board of stakeholders (e.g., stress, manufacturing, procurement) for their review and approval.

expected_outcome.value: Agent routes the ECR to the correct review board.

nodes.task_description: Once approved, update the official engineering drawing and bill of materials to reflect the change.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the relevant engineering documents with the new material specification.
